creator: grembo@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Jesús,

This was fixed (in an almost identical way) in https://cgit.freebsd.org/src/commit/?id=3d36053ca6d6a17d408c8f92c504e6135dc9d8df - unfortunately I only noticed through the mailing list, otherwise I would've looked at your contribution (which would have saved time). At least I learned a bit how the unit test framework works :)

Thank you for reporting and providing a patch, much appreciated!
